title: Hello Mari here
wikitext:
[]: Hello, Mari here.             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 02, 2009 3:05 am Has anyone been able to tell what all of her English lines are in that short camripped scene? I've made out what sounds like the following: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Thu Jul 02, 2009 3:16 am I think that last bit is "extraction"

[]:             Quote Post by JimmyWolk » Thu Jul 02, 2009 3:20 am "town? tunnel?" > "school". Has been mentioned in reviews, and, well, it is on the school.

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Thu Jul 02, 2009 4:00 am I'm only no doubt with the Japanese part: SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Hello, Mari here.             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Thu Jul 02, 2009 4:02 am Modified to what I think she says: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Thu Jul 02, 2009 12:51 pm Hello, Mari here, Im probably one of the better looking characters out of the Children, lol

[]:             Quote Post by DummyPlug » Thu Jul 02, 2009 1:12 pm SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 02, 2009 1:51 pm Shes a spy, a spy I say! Now I wonder if she is from Seele or some part of NERV...Hmm..

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Jul 02, 2009 2:44 pm She sounded like she was drunk and her tongue was numb, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 02, 2009 5:20 pm Timstuff wrote: She sounded like she was drunk and her tongue was numb, lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Thu Jul 02, 2009 9:07 pm So Mari pulled a Gustav Graves/James Bond/ Austin Powers? Stereotypical Limey Spy...

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Jul 03, 2009 3:39 am I don't think anyone's revealed her nationality yet. Although there was a lot of Tartan Skirt = LOL BRITISH in the speculation threads.

[]:             Quote Post by Eric Blair » Fri Jul 03, 2009 3:55 am Illustrious was a Royal navy ship, IIRC... that and the fact that she speaks better English than Asuka Langley Shikinami.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 03, 2009 5:12 pm What's really being said with the Mari/Shinji meet scene (though I might be off with the "why can't" part, everything else seems okay): SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by CtHuLhU » Mon Jul 06, 2009 4:54 am Erm, from chans. Seems ok =) SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Desty_Nova » Mon Jul 06, 2009 8:16 am SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jul 06, 2009 9:39 am It's not a sequel. I'd say to simplify things in Rebuild with the exception of Eva Unit 01, none of the Eva's have human souls. They're living, breathing creatures but they don't have a human core at the center. Who knows. But the chances of Mari having any relation to Asuka (or Asuka playing any future role in Rebuild other than being an emotional anchor for Shinji or kicking ass) is slim to none.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Jul 06, 2009 10:09 am Desty_Nova, your Mari speculation would best go in the thread below- http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=4369&start=380

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Mon Jul 06, 2009 1:41 pm Keep in mind that, even in the original series, the Evas could be reconfigured to work with other pilots.... Well, that was the plan, anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by evapilot » Mon Jul 13, 2009 9:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: What's really being said with the Mari/Shinji meet scene (though I might be off with the "why can't" part, everything else seems okay): SPOILER: Show
